status: IDENTITY AND ANALYTICAL EVIDENCE STRUCTURED — FULL-LENGTH HUMAN CLINICAL CLOSURE PARTIAL — TB-500 HUMAN EVIDENCE INSUFFICIENT — NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
evidence_maturity: Full-length thymosin beta-4 has established structure and clinical-development evidence; TB-500 has fragment-identity and analytical detection evidence but not equivalent human efficacy evidence.
identity_and_translation_boundary: Full-length thymosin beta-4 and TB-500 remain separate evidence identities.
